allow: Bash(git commit -m 'The Ship: side-elevation deck chart — all 11 passenger decks at once, with every major amenity stamped at its actual fore/mid/aft position and pins for the group'\\''s three staterooms on Deck 5 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Navigation: glass surface with scroll-deepened shadow, voyage-stop numbering, scrollspy underline and distinguished Console pill *)

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./documents.json'\); const c={confirmed:0,pending:0,gap:0}; d.documents.forEach\(x=>c[x.status]++\); console.log\('docs:',d.documents.length\); console.log\(c\); const cats=[...new Set\(d.documents.map\(x=>x.category\)\)]; const known=d.categories.map\(x=>x.id\); console.log\('categories used:',cats.join\(','\)\); console.log\('unknown cat refs:', cats.filter\(x=>!known.includes\(x\)\).join\(','\)||'none'\); const tk=Object.keys\(d.meta.travellers\); console.log\('bad who refs:', [...new Set\(d.documents.flatMap\(x=>x.who\)\)].filter\(w=>!tk.includes\(w\)\).join\(','\)||'none'\);")
